title: echoconda: Getting Started
text: echoconda provides robust utilities find, build, use, export conda environments within R. wraps reticulate basilisk give consistent, cross-platform interface managing Python dependencies needed echoverse tool suite.

title: echoconda: Getting Started
text: conda yet available system, echoconda can install Miniconda :

title: echoconda: Getting Started
text: build “echoR_mini” conda environment default.

title: echoconda: Getting Started
code: pkgs <- echoconda::find_packages(   packages = c("python", "tabix", "axel"),   conda_env = "echoR_mini" ) knitr::kable(pkgs)

title: echoconda: Getting Started
text: addition, echoconda can automatically convert command-line interface (CLI) tools R functions.

title: echoconda: Getting Started
text: use conda-installed version tabix example.
code: #### Import tool #### tabix <- echoconda::import_cli(   path = "tabix",   conda_env = "echoR_mini" )  #### Use function to query a file #### target_path <- system.file("extdata", "BST1.1KGphase3.vcf.bgz",                            package = "echodata") query <- "4:5000-100000000"  res <- tabix(D = TRUE,              h = TRUE,              ... = paste(target_path, query)) dat <- data.table::fread(text = res, skip = "#CHROM")

what: echoconda: Various utility functions to find, build, and use conda environments from within R.

text: R package part echoverse suite supports echolocatoR: automated genomic fine-mapping pipeline. use echoconda, please cite: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658

title: Neatly print commands — cmd_print
text: cmd Command string list strings. raw Print raw cmd text. basepath component cmd path, shorten path just basename. prefix basepath=TRUE, append prefix path. wrap wrap NULL, use separate arguments newlines. verbose Print messages.

title: Create conda env — create_env
text: Create conda env using one several methods.

title: Create conda env — create_env
code: create_env(   conda_env,   yaml_path,   method = c("basilisk", "reticulate", "cli"),   conda = "auto",   force_new = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Create conda env — create_env
text: yaml_path Path local remote yaml file conda build specifications. method Method use create conda env: "basilisk" : Uses R package basilisk. "reticulate" : Uses R package reticulate. "cli" : Uses custom wrapper conda's command line interface. conda path conda executable. Use "auto" allow reticulate automatically find appropriate conda binary. See Finding Conda conda_binary() details. force_new conda env already exists, overwrite new one (DEFAULT: FALSE). verbose Print messages. ... Additional arguments passed method-specific conda env build functions: basilisk: create_env_basilisk reticulate: conda_create cli: create_env_cli

title: Create conda env: basilisk — create_env_basilisk
text: yaml_path Path local remote yaml file conda build specifications. pkgs data.table columns: "package" : Package names. "version" : Package versions. "channel" : Channel package installed . table can generated env_to_yaml function. use_subversion Specify specific package subversion. start Execute basiliskStart build actual environment.

what: Find package across all conda envs — find_packages
title: Find package across all conda envs — find_packages
text: Search package (list packages) across available conda  environments.  default, returns packages conda environments.

title: Find package across all conda envs — find_packages
code: find_packages(   packages = NULL,   conda_env = NULL,   conda = "auto",   method = c("r", "reticulate", "basilisk"),   types = c("r", "python", "binary"),   return_path = FALSE,   robust = FALSE,   filter_paths = FALSE,   sort_names = FALSE,   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Find package across all conda envs — find_packages
text: packages package (e.g. "pandas") list packages (e.g. c("pandas","r-dplyr","bgzip")). recognize R packages without prefixes "r-" "bioconductor-" (.e. "r-dplyr" equivalent "dplyr"). conda_env Conda environments search . NULL (default), search conda environments. conda path conda executable. Use "auto" allow reticulate automatically find appropriate conda binary. See Finding Conda conda_binary() details. method Method use: "basilisk" "reticulate" types Path type search include table. return_path Return path package. robust Uses robust (slower) method identifying paths conda environments package executables (default: FALSE). robust=FALSE, executables main "bin" directory  detected. robust=TRUE, additional executables  R packages, Python packages, executables nested subdirectories  detected. filter_paths Filter packages without callable executable paths table. sort_names Sort packages alphanumerically name. nThread Number threads use parallelizing searches across multiple conda envs. verbose Print messages.

title: Find package across all conda envs — find_packages
text: Merged data.table packages installed conda environment.

title: Parse options — parse_options
text: Parse available options (arguments) given command line tool.

title: Parse options — parse_options
code: parse_options(   path,   command = NA,   subcommand = NA,   help_args = c("-h", "--help", "-help", "-H"),   args_sep = "\n",   args_start = "-+[a-z]+",   col_names = c("arg", "description"),   verbose = TRUE )

title: Parse options — parse_options
text: path Path executable file. command Modifying command tool (e.g. "submodule" running "git submodule add"). subcommand Modifying subcommand tool (e.g. "add" running "git submodule add"). help_args Help arguments use identifying argument options. args_sep Regex pattern separates new argument. args_start Regex pattern search detecting beginning argument description. col_names Column names parsing. verbose Print messages.

text: Create conda environment yaml file. default, creates "echoR" conda env support echolocatoR.

title: Create conda env from yaml file — yaml_to_env
code: yaml_to_env(   yaml_path = system.file(package = "echoconda", "conda", "echoR_mini.yml"),   method = c("basilisk", "reticulate"),   conda = "auto",   force_new = FALSE,   show_contents = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE,   ... )

title: Create conda env from yaml file — yaml_to_env
text: GitHub Issue StackOverflow suggestions cross-platform troubleshooting

title: Create conda env from yaml file — yaml_to_env
text: yaml_path Path local remote yaml file conda build specifications. method Method use create conda env: "basilisk" : Uses R package basilisk. "reticulate" : Uses R package reticulate. "cli" : Uses custom wrapper conda's command line interface. conda path conda executable. Use "auto" allow reticulate automatically find appropriate conda binary. See Finding Conda conda_binary() details. force_new conda env already exists, overwrite new one (DEFAULT: FALSE). show_contents Show contents yaml file (used). verbose Print messages. ... Additional arguments passed method-specific conda env build functions: basilisk: create_env_basilisk reticulate: conda_create cli: create_env_cli

title: Create conda env from yaml file — yaml_to_env
echoconda 1.0.0
text: Update basilisk.utils API calls current Bioconductor release. Fix install_conda_reticulate passing "auto" literal path instead resolving . Fix basilisk env creation: use full version pins, pin python>=3.11. Remove tracked .DS_Store files.

title: echoconda 0.99.12
text: Local R CMD check fixes compatibility updates.

title: echoconda 0.99.11
text: Standardize rworkflows.yml canonical template: enable Docker ghcr.io, set write-permissions. Preserve python: 3.11 matrix config. Remove tracked .DS_Store files.

title: echoconda 0.99.10
text: Updated rworkflows.

title: echoconda 0.99.9
text: Implemented rworkflows. Added set_rhome functions.

title: echoconda 0.99.8
text: search_yamls returns yaml path, Check env exists earlier. Add echodata Imports. Fix GHA: @master –> @v2 Add R packages back “echoR_mini” PolyFun.

title: echoconda 0.99.7
text: get_os find_executables_remote

title: echoconda 0.99.7
text: set_permissions: Remove use echodata implementation instead (avoid namespace conflicts). find_executables_remote: Avoid printing verbose=FALSE.

title: echoconda 0.99.6
text: remove_env create_env find_conda list_envs Benchmarked multiple methods speed completeness recovering excecutable paths. Setup basilisk Bare minimum conda env solves 2.5min. Replaces echoR default. Install conda via basilisk default.

title: echoconda 0.99.6
text: newest version git introduced bugs building pkgdown sites within Docker containers (e.g. via Linux GHA workflow). Adjusting GHA fix . Add R.utils Imports.

title: echoconda 0.99.5
text: cmd_print set_permissions epiprocess.yml

title: echoconda 0.99.4
text: Update GitHub Actions. find_packages: New function search packages across conda envs. env_to_yaml: New function export yaml file. yaml_to_env: New function create env yaml file. list_yamls: New function list available yaml files shipped echoconda. Add minimal test.yml test_bad.yml files.

title: echoconda 0.99.4
text: Try allow switching envs . Omit setting env vars zzz.R. Provide echoR_windows.yaml omits conda packages available Windows OS.

title: echoconda 0.99.0
text: Added NEWS.md file track changes package.
